thread.title: Hidden UN SDG Goals - What Can We Do To Stop This? - The Washington Standard
thread.title_full: Hidden UN SDG Goals - What Can We Do To Stop This? - The Washington Standard

author: Karen Schumacher
title: Hidden UN SDG Goals - What Can We Do To Stop This? - The Washington Standard
text:
If one isn’t constantly paying attention, the United Nations (UN) and World Economic Forum (WEF) incrementally expose covert aspects to the Sustainable Development Goals (SDG). It is advancing so rapidly that it is almost impossible to keep up with the agenda.
Recently, the UN “passed” its Pact of the Future . Its Global Digital Compact was also “adopted”. Not contained in the original SDGs , on page 8 the Compact has now altered them by including digital technology into each goal. This confirms all that has been said about the digital prison that is being built for control over everyone.
From the use of smartphones, a digital ID will track all financial transactions. Enhanced indoctrination of children will occur with aligned curriculum based on international standards and control over what is taught. Increased public dependency on the government can be wholly achieved with “e-government services” and “social protection programs”. With the Internet of Things ( IoT ) and data platforms tracking and storage of all social behavior in blockchains can be accomplished, while water and other resource use can also be tracked, and controlled. Based on the information collected, artificial intelligence (AI) will make all decisions on how life is lived and how resources are used. Governments, corporations, and non-governmental organizations (NGO) will be actively working behind the scenes, gathering data through a digital public infrastructure system ( DPI ). Using AI, the WEF Future Global Councils are ready to go, making all decisions about the fate of civilization and the planet.
Even though the UN and WEF have chosen to reveal this diabolical plot behind the SDGs, what is not mentioned is the digital prison for humanity that is being built . There are probably more covert aspects the UN and WEF haven’t fully exposed but what is known is that it is an ominous future with their plan for the “fusion of digital, biological and physical worlds “.
The question becomes, what can humanity do to stop this?
